name: Sol Brynn
blurb: Contract runs to 2030, but Leeds are watching closely — where his season ends up may depend on where Boro's does.

name: Seny Dieng
blurb: Boro's No.2 for two seasons, but a permanent exit is genuinely under consideration this summer — not a settled part of the plans right now.

name: Neto Borges
blurb: Back from a Bristol City loan that nearly went permanent — Hellberg's called his shirt "up for grabs," not his.

name: Alex Bangura
blurb: Solid one-v-one, limited going forward — an Achilles injury cost him most of last season, still working back to full sharpness.

name: Finley Munroe
blurb: Signed permanently from Aston Villa in January, still bedding into the side — not one to be calling surplus.

name: Leo Castledine
_unresolvedNote: Round24: one lower-reliability source claims a permanent Leo Castledine signing FROM Chelsea this summer, conflicting with this existing academy-player entry (round11 tag fix). That source also had another claim that looked wrong on its face, so treat it as unverified. Not actioned — needs a better source confirming same/different player before this entry changes.

name: Myles Peart-Harris
blurb: Boro's first signing of the summer, free from Oxford on a four-year deal — still bedding in, not deadweight.

name: Delano Burgzorg
blurb: Started last season well, but a move away is reportedly being weighed by both club and player — his future isn't settled.

name: Micah Hamilton
blurb: Left out of the pre-season squad entirely — City hold a buy-back clause, and this looks like a loan or permanent exit before deadline day.
